Title: Whimsical Floral Picnic Basket Sticker - Spring Summer Craft Decal
Description:
Bring the joy of a perfect spring day to any surface with this charming floral picnic basket sticker. Designed with a delightful vintage aesthetic, this decal captures the sweet nostalgia of sunflowers, fluttering butterflies, and checkered picnic throws.

  • Vibrant Design: Features detailed illustrations of cheerful sunflowers, an ornate woven basket, and delicate butterflies, making it an instant focal point.
  • Durable Quality: Made from high-quality, weather-resistant material perfect for indoor and outdoor crafting projects.
  • Easy Application: Simple to apply and peel, ensuring a smooth and flawless finish on various surfaces.

Ideal for decorating journals, laptops, water bottles, craft boxes, or scrapbooks. This sticker is the perfect pick-me-up for seasonal décor, making it a wonderful gift for spring lovers, crafters, or anyone who appreciates cheerful, whimsical art.
